users_confirm_block: Are you sure you want to block {name}? This user will lose access to the system.
users_confirm_activate: Are you sure you want to activate {name}? This user will be able to access the system again.
users_invite_desc: The user will receive a link to set their password.
role_description_OWNER: Full system control. For development team only.
role_description_ADMIN: Manages users, roles and business settings.
role_description_MANAGER: Access to most modules to operate the business.
role_description_EDITOR: Can create and edit content in assigned modules.
role_description_VIEWER: Can only view reports and catalogs without editing.
